CustomField.description: Number of calendar days between the first public notice and the event date. Shorter advance notice disproportionately disadvantages low-income and rural communities with less scheduling flexibility. CEQ best practice is 15+ days; FRA compressed timelines often result in shorter windows.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Days of advance notice given before this event. CEQ best practice: 15 or more days.
CustomField.label: Advance Notice Days
